text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After training, Winning Ticket grabs Biwa
Hayahide, insisting we go to a restaurant near the
academy.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Yum! That's GOOD!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
The portion's so big! The hamburger steak's so
juicy! This is what I really wanted to sink my teeth
into!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
After full-power practicing, some full-power
eating is the best!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Um, Ticket? You should eat more slowly. It won't
be "the best" at all if you choke on your food.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Also, you must take care not to overeat. If you
gain weight, it will impact your race results.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Whoa, really?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Hmm... but I still wanna eat lots and lots...
choice_data_list: Let's eat at full power until we feel full!
Let's eat at full power until we feel full!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Hmm... but I still wanna eat lots and lots...
choice_data_list: Let's eat at full power until we feel full!
Let's eat at full power until we feel full!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Moderation? Moderate... So, like, how much is
moderate?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Well, it might differ a little by person, but
generally for food, you could say it's good to
stop before you find yourself feeling full.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Ahh, I getcha! So...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
It's kinda like the middle between being starved
and about to explode! Makes sense!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Okay! I'm gonna go moderate—at full power!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Dear me... You certainly have a unique way of
looking at things.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Yeah! You're totally right! My trainer knows best!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna eat with all my might until I'm about to
explode. That'll definitely make me happy!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, interesting... If freedom is the direction you
choose, then I'll refrain from interfering.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Ticket, I see now that your trainer has a greater
capacity than most.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Huh? I think my trainer eats the same amount of
food as any regular person.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I was referring to the capacity to put up with your
antics...
